summary:
Leading AI/ML architecture and multi-agent system development for telecom.
- Led end-to-end development of multi-agent application for content generation using LangGraph, Langfuse, and vLLM
- Architected CI/CD log analyzer using LangGraph, Langfuse, and AWS Bedrock, automating detection of complex pipeline failures
- Designed and built GenAI application for project office, enhancing operational efficiency
- Managed and optimized large-scale Kubeflow GPU clusters for LLM development, deployment and inference
- Led cross-functional collaboration to deploy production-grade Time Series Analysis models with complete MLOps pipeline
- Mentored and led multiple intern projects, guiding novel AI solutions from concept to completion

Developed Aggregator, SDN-based packet broker product.
- Delivered reusable and robust code while improving architecture design

Integration and verification for telecom solutions.
- Developed deployment automation, reducing deployment time from 6 months to two weeks
- Supported product integration in Enterprise LTE projects
- Conducted research in NFV performance benchmark and optimization with CPU pinning and NUMA awareness
Developed products using C/C++, Java, Linux Shell, and MySQL.
